config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but individual rights should not be treated as secondary by default, because that opens the door to abuse by governments or majorities. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting personal dignity, freedom, and due process first, then balancing those rights with the common good when there is a clear and necessary reason. From my perspective, collective interests are important, but they should not automatically override the individual.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dimaknai sebagai hak individu bisa dikalahkan begitu saja oleh kepentingan masyarakat. Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang umum di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat perlindungan hak individu justru menjadi dasar agar mayoritas atau pemerintah tidak mudah menyalahgunakan kuasa atas nama “kebaikan bersama.” Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh proses yang adil, alasan yang jelas, dan perlindungan terhadap martabat serta kebebasan pribadi. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai sebagai pembenaran untuk menekan orang yang lemah atau tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in Indonesia, I understand the appeal of collectivism because we often value harmony, mutual help, and social order, but I have also seen how easily “the common good” can be used to pressure dissenters or excuse unfair treatment. The state and the majority should be able to limit some individual freedoms only when there is a clear, necessary, and proportionate reason, not just because something is convenient for society. If individual rights are treated as disposable, society does not become stronger; it becomes more vulnerable to abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Dari sudut pandang Amerika Serikat, saya melihat justru hak individu adalah pagar utama agar mayoritas dan pemerintah tidak memakai dalih “kepentingan umum” untuk menekan orang yang tidak populer, seperti yang sudah disinggung sebelumnya. Kepentingan sosial memang nyata dan kadang perlu membatasi kebebasan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan dapat dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan otomatis. Kalau hak individu dianggap sekunder, yang terjadi bukan masyarakat yang lebih kuat, melainkan ruang yang lebih besar untuk penyalahgunaan kuasa.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the idea that society should automatically come before the individual, because in Indonesia I have seen how easily “public interest” can be used to silence criticism or justify unfair treatment. Harmony and mutual help are important in our culture, but they are healthiest when people still have strong protection for speech, due process, and personal dignity. Society should sometimes limit individual freedom, but only when the reason is clear, necessary, and proportionate; otherwise, that priority becomes a tool for abuse rather than a path to the common good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu jika dijadikan prinsip umum, karena menurut saya hak individu harus tetap menjadi batas utama bagi kekuasaan masyarakat. Dari perspektif Amerika Serikat, sejarah kami cukup jelas menunjukkan bahwa dalih “kepentingan umum” bisa dipakai untuk membenarkan diskriminasi, sensor, atau penyalahgunaan wewenang terhadap orang yang tidak populer. Kepentingan sosial memang penting, tetapi hanya sah didahulukan dalam kondisi yang benar-benar perlu, dengan alasan yang jelas, sempit, dan dapat diuji. Kalau tidak, yang disebut kebaikan bersama terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alat untuk menekan kebebasan dan martabat pribadi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
